allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('nativewind/package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({main: pkg.main, exports: pkg.exports, version: pkg.version}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('react-native-web/package.json'\); console.log\('RNW version:', pkg.version\); const rn = require\('react-native/package.json'\); console.log\('RN version:', rn.version\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {d.get\(\\"total\\",\\"?\\"\)}, Page: {len\(d.get\(\\"data\\",[]\)\)} companies'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Paths:', len\(d.get\('paths',{}\)\)\); print\('Schemas:', len\(d.get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\)\)\); print\('Groups:', [t['name'] for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Paths:', len\(d.get\('paths',{}\)\)\); print\('Schemas:', len\(d.get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\)\)\); [print\(f'  - {t[\\"name\\"]}: {t[\\"description\\"][:60]}'\) for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)]")

PowerShell($process = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8082 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($process\) { Write-Output "PID $\($process.OwningProcess\) on port 8082"; Get-Process -Id $process.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName } else { Write-Output "Nothing on port 8082" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 8080 }; if \($proc\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess; Write-Host "Killing process: $\($p.ProcessName\) \(PID: $\($p.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Write-Host "Backend stopped." } else { Write-Host "No process found on port 8080." })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/companies?page=0&size=3" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Total companies: $\($json.totalElements\)"; Write-Host "Companies on page:"; $json.content | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  - $\($_.name\) | $\($_.sector\) | $\($_.city\), $\($_.state\)" })

PowerShell($ports = @\(8081, 8082\); foreach \($port in $ports\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq $port }; if \($conn\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port $port : $\($proc.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\) - stopping..."; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "  Stopped." } else { Write-Host "Port $port : nothing listening" } })

PowerShell($ports = @\(8080, 8081, 19006\); foreach \($port in $ports\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq $port }; if \($conn\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Host "Port $port : $\($proc.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Port $port : not listening" } })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 8080 }; if \($proc\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Write-Host "Stopped backend on port 8080" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\lakhbir\\Desktop\\dob\\backend; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "java" -ArgumentList "-jar target\\dob-backend-1.0.0.jar --spring.profiles.active=local" -RedirectStandardOutput "target\\backend-stdout.log" -RedirectStandardError "target\\backend-stderr.log"; Write-Output "Backend started \(PID: $\(\(Get-Process -Name java | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-1\) }\).Id\)\)")

PowerShell($conn = [System.Net.NetworkInformation.IPGlobalProperties]::GetIPGlobalProperties\(\); $listener = $conn.GetActiveTcpListeners\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Port -eq 8080 }; if \($listener\) { $pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $pid on port 8080" } else { Write-Output "No owning process found" } } else { Write-Output "Port 8080 is free" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { $ownerPid = $proc.OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $ownerPid -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $ownerPid on port 8080" } else { Write-Output "Port 8080 is free" })

PowerShell($be = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($be\) { Stop-Process -Id $be.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "Killed old process, port freed" } else { Write-Output "Port 8080 is free" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; Select-String -Path C:\\Users\\lakhbir\\Desktop\\dob\\backend\\target\\backend-stdout.log -Pattern "Started DobApplication" -SimpleMatch | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "✅ Backend started"; $be = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($be\) { Write-Output "✅ Port 8080 \(PID $\($be.OwningProcess\)\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "✅ Health: $\($h.status\)"; $c = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/companies?page=0&size=2" -Method Get; Write-Output "✅ API: $\($c.totalElements\) companies \(masked\)" } catch { Write-Output "❌ $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
